description:
Persistent agent memory across phases and tasks.

## Phase 1: Cross-Phase Memory — COMPLETED
Implemented in phase_executor.rs:
- persist_phase_output() writes PersistedPhaseOutput JSON to .ao/state/workflows/<workflow_id>/phase-outputs/<phase_id>.json
- load_prior_phase_outputs() reads prior outputs in pipeline order
- format_prior_phase_outputs() formats into readable context blocks
- build_phase_prompt() injects via __PRIOR_PHASE_OUTPUTS__ template variable
- Decision trail captured via verdict, confidence, reason fields in PersistedPhaseOutput
- Tests exist: test_persist_and_load_phase_output, test_load_prior_phase_outputs_ordering, test_format_prior_phase_outputs_renders_sections, test_format_prior_phase_outputs_truncation

## Phase 2: Task-Level Memory — NOT STARTED
- Task memory file: TASK-XXX.memory.md in .ao/state/tasks/<task_id>/memory.md
- Agents append findings/decisions during execution, injected into phase prompt via __TASK_MEMORY__
- Tasks created: TASK-203

## Phase 3: Project-Level Memory — NOT STARTED
- Project agent memory: ~/.ao/<scope>/agent-memory.md for cross-task patterns
- ao memory list/get/clear CLI subcommands
- Memory size management with automatic summarization/truncation
- Tasks created: TASK-204, TASK-205

## Phase 4: Semantic Search — DEFERRED
- SQLite + sqlite-vec for vector storage when markdown files grow large
- Note: sqlite-vec is a C extension — needs dependency policy review before implementation
title: Persistent Agent Memory Across Phases and Tasks
